docs: D:\Erise-Ai-doc\rag功能\知识库软件 需求补充.txt
mandatory_requirements: JDK 21 LTS + Spring Boot 3.5.13 + Spring AI 1.1.4
MySQL 8.4 LTS with utf8mb4 and InnoDB
ONLYOFFICE Docs with AGPL/commercial licensing notice
PaddleOCR PP-Structure with OCR and table extraction always enabled
OpenAI Responses API + DeepSeek compatible adapter
Vue 3.5.31 + Vite 8 + Element Plus 2.13.3 + Node.js 24 LTS
Modular monolith with api and worker runtime roles

technical_decisions.backend: JDK 21 LTS + Spring Boot 3.5.13 + Spring AI 1.1.4
technical_decisions.mysql: MySQL 8.4 LTS with utf8mb4 and InnoDB
technical_decisions.office: ONLYOFFICE Docs with AGPL/commercial licensing notice
technical_decisions.ocr: PaddleOCR PP-Structure with OCR and table extraction always enabled
technical_decisions.ai: OpenAI Responses API + DeepSeek compatible adapter
technical_decisions.frontend: Vue 3.5.31 + Vite 8 + Element Plus 2.13.3 + Node.js 24 LTS
technical_decisions.architecture: Modular monolith with api and worker runtime roles

module_boundaries.name: auth-user
module_boundaries.scope: registration, login, token lifecycle, profile, authz

module_boundaries.name: file-storage
module_boundaries.scope: upload, preview, download, MinIO, chunked upload, dedupe

module_boundaries.name: office-edit
module_boundaries.scope: ONLYOFFICE config signing, callbacks, version history

module_boundaries.name: note
module_boundaries.scope: rich text notes, export, note lifecycle

module_boundaries.name: kb-ingest
module_boundaries.scope: Tika/PDFBox/PaddleOCR parsing, chunking, embeddings, pgvector writes

module_boundaries.name: ai-chat
module_boundaries.scope: RAG orchestration, provider adapters, SSE, usage metering

module_boundaries.name: admin-audit
module_boundaries.scope: risk review, audit tasks, notifications, audit logs

module_boundaries.name: job-scheduler
module_boundaries.scope: async jobs, retries, scheduling, rate limits

delivery_standards: api/worker role isolation in one modular-monolith codebase
OCR and table extraction always enabled for KB ingest
